response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with 15+ years across fullstack, backend, mobile, and embedded work, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product development and directly relevant AI-agent tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks). Core stack alignment is strong on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes, with a demonstrated testing and software-craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries). Gaps are secondary: no Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, and much of the frontend depth is in Ember rather than React.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work and AI-agent/MCP tooling experience matching the role's AI requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries, and ran testing workshops
Solid infrastructure breadth: AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and high-throughput low-latency systems experience
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed, and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned despite strong general testing background
Frontend depth leans toward Ember.js; React experience appears more limited
No Kotlin and no listed Python; significant career investment in niche DLang ecosystem

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and limited React/Kotlin depth
